calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge.
James P. Nevin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Joseph Garza.
Order granting waiver of appearance of witness on file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:
Damages/Principal $2,132.04
Prejudgment Interest $206.36
Costs $400.10, for a total of $2,738.50
Judgment signed in open court.
